title: How To Make A Desoldering Bath From An Iron Or Toaster Or Hob
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
Desoldering is a pain without a desoldering bath - here i go through making one from a Hob, but equally you could use a houshold idon or a toaster - an amazingly useful bit of kit if you ask me
